items.definition_en: A blender mixes or chops food quickly.
items.example_en: She made a smoothie in the blender.

items.definition_en: A toaster quickly browns slices of bread.
items.example_en: He put the bread in the toaster this morning.

items.definition_en: A microwave heats food very fast.
items.example_en: She heats her lunch in the microwave every day.

items.definition_en: A fridge keeps food cold and fresh.
items.example_en: Please put the milk in the fridge.

items.definition_en: A freezer keeps food frozen.
items.example_en: Ice cream stays hard in the freezer.

items.definition_en: An oven bakes or roasts food.
items.example_en: The cake is baking in the oven.

items.definition_en: A kettle is used to boil water.
items.example_en: She made tea with the kettle.

items.definition_en: A dishwasher washes dirty dishes.
items.example_en: He put the plates in the dishwasher.

items.definition_en: A coffee maker brews coffee.
items.example_en: The coffee maker is on the kitchen counter.

items.definition_en: A rice cooker cooks rice easily.
items.example_en: She made dinner using the rice cooker.

items.definition_en: A slow cooker cooks food over many hours.
items.example_en: He prepared stew in the slow cooker.

items.definition_en: A food processor chops or mixes food fast.
items.example_en: She uses her food processor for baking.

items.definition_en: A stove is used for cooking food.
items.example_en: He turned on the stove to cook pasta.

items.definition_en: A mixer blends or stirs ingredients.
items.example_en: Mix the eggs with the mixer.

items.definition_en: A grill cooks food over heat or fire.
items.example_en: They put burgers on the grill.

items.definition_en: A deep fryer cooks food in hot oil.
items.example_en: He made fries with the deep fryer.

items.definition_en: A bread maker bakes bread automatically.
items.example_en: She uses a bread maker every week.

items.definition_en: A juicer squeezes juice from fruit or vegetables.
items.example_en: He made orange juice with the juicer.

items.definition_en: A sandwich maker toasts sandwiches.
items.example_en: I made a quick lunch with the sandwich maker.

items.definition_en: A steam cooker cooks food with steam.
items.example_en: Vegetables are healthy from the steam cooker.
